prompt: Please generate a set of "Underworld Heiress · High-end Japanese-style Portraits" based on the clear single-person portrait reference image I uploaded, for a total of 9 images, all as individual images, no nine-grid collages, no composite posters. Each is a 3:4 vertical composition. ## Fixed Master Control Strictly retain the actual identity characteristics of the reference person: face shape, facial feature proportions, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, hairline, skin tone, sense of age, and overall recognizability. Do not swap faces, do not turn into a stranger, do not use an influencer face, do not infantilize, do not animate, do not use an AI doll face. Skin should retain real texture, slight pores, natural facial shadows, and real photographic quality. Overall Style: Young heir of an underworld family, high-end Japanese-style portrait, cold, restrained, dangerous, noble, in control, feminine but not vulgar. The image should look like a ten-thousand-dollar studio fashion blockbuster, not cosplay, not a game poster, not cheap studio style. The scene is unified as a Japanese-style room built in a real photo studio: bright shoji doors, tatami mats, bamboo shadows, black paper umbrellas, white flower branches, low tea tables, white porcelain tea sets, old screens, and dark wood spaces. The image can be dark, but not pitch black; black fabrics must have layers of gray-black, charcoal black, brownish-black, and ink black, with visible folds, embroidery, and sleeve hems. Lighting: Side window hard light + soft reflected fill light + slight rim light. Shoji doors can be bright, but the person's face, skin, kimono, tea set, and flower branches must not be blurred. Clothing: High-end black kimono or modified furisode, obvious white inner lining collar, embroidery in dark red, withered gold, old silver, dark green, flower branch patterns, butterfly patterns, or family crests. Silver-gray gold brocade obi, heavy and three-dimensional. Dark brown or black hair, loose or high updo, with natural stray hairs, paired with dark red spider lilies, red flower hairpins, metal hairpins, or fine tassels. Cold and elegant makeup, slender eye makeup, deep red, wine red, or brown-red lips, no pink girlish feel. Body and posture must be real and natural: only one person appears, normal body proportions, clear logic for arms and legs, natural joints, normal fingers. No extra hands or feet, no missing legs, do not show only one leg causing a sense of disconnection, do not merge legs, do not distort hips, no toe deformities. In any shot showing legs, the posture of both legs must be understandable: one leg folded, the other extended, or both legs naturally covered by the kimono but with a complete body structure. Actions should be high-end and restrained, not erotic, and not overly sexualized. Image Restrictions: No text, no vertical Japanese text, no logo, no watermark, no photographer signature. No guns, no gore, no fighting. Katana, scabbards, and folding fans can appear, but only as static atmosphere props. --- ## 01 | Paper Umbrella Tearoom Sitting Pose Inside a Japanese-style room, bright shoji doors are to the side and rear, with a black paper umbrella, white flower branches, a low tea table, and a white porcelain tea set forming the background layers. The subject sits on a tatami mat, body slightly turned, not sitting stiffly. One hand holds a teacup, the other rests lightly on the knee. The kimono collar is naturally relaxed, revealing the collarbone and neck line. She stares directly at the camera with a calm, aloof, and oppressive gaze. Half-body to 3/4 body vertical composition, focusing on the face, neck, teacup, hands, obi, and black kimono texture. --- ## 02 | High-angle Folding Fan Shot A slightly high-angle shot of the entire Japanese room, showing tatami texture, window light and shadows, low tea table, white porcelain tea set, black paper umbrella, white flower branches, and bamboo shadow screen. The subject sits to one side of the center of the tatami, holding an open black folding fan, with the other hand naturally supporting her on the floor. Elegant and quiet posture, head lowered or eyes closed, not looking at the camera, like a candid moment. Body structure must be stable: both legs must have clear logic. One leg naturally folded, the other extending forward or diagonally; the kimono hem naturally spread out, but not showing only one leg. Focus is on space, folding fan, tatami, kimono arrangement, and body curves. --- ## 03 | Close-up Gaze with Sword Close-up of a Japanese room under bright window light, background has shoji doors, black paper umbrella outlines, white flower branches, and dark screens. Subject wears a black embroidered kimono, clear white collar, and obvious silver-gray gold obi. Hands hold a scabbard or a half-drawn katana as a static power prop, no aggressive movement. Close-up composition focusing on face, eyes, neck, hands, and sword hilt. She looks up directly at the camera with sharp, cold, alert, and oppressive eyes. Fingers must be natural, and the sword hilt must not be deformed. --- ## 04 | Side-sitting Long Leg Extension Japanese room floor, background with bright shoji doors, bamboo shadows, black paper umbrella, white flower branches, low tea table, and white porcelain tea set. Window light hits the tatami and the subject's legs, forming real light and shadow cuts. The subject sits sideways on the tatami, body leaning back slightly, one hand on the floor, the other lightly holding a folding fan or near the tea table. Both legs must be complete and natural: one leg folded to the side, the other extending forward, showing normal thigh, knee, calf, and foot lines. Do not show only one leg, do not merge legs, no foot deformities. She looks into the distance, with a lazy, cold, and dangerous expression. Medium vertical composition, highlighting body extension, hip line, leg posture, foreground flower branches, and black kimono folds. --- ## 05 | Leaning Over the Tea Table The subject is near a low tea table with a white porcelain teapot, teacup, small flower branch, and closed folding fan. Background is shoji doors, black paper umbrella, and bamboo shadow screen. She leans forward slightly, one hand on the table edge, the other lightly holding a teacup or folding fan. Shoulder line naturally tilted, waist slightly twisted, forming a soft upper body curve. The kimono collar opens naturally, highlighting the collarbone and neck, but maintaining high-end restraint. She looks down at the teacup, then slightly looks up at the camera, with an aloof, calm expression and a hint of dangerous attraction. Half-body vertical composition, focusing on face, collarbone, arms, tea set, and tabletop details. --- ## 06 | Standing Side Profile with Sword Center of a Japanese room, background has bright shoji doors, bamboo shadow screen, black paper umbrella, white flower branches, and wood space. Overall more formal, light is clear but with contrast. The subject stands sideways, weight on one leg, waist slightly tucked, neck extended. Hands hold a scabbard or katana vertically, the sword as an atmosphere prop, no attack. Head slightly turned, gaze towards the side front or half-lidded, cold, restrained, and dangerous. 3/4 body vertical composition, focusing on the sword, facial profile, neck, obi, sleeve hems, and standing aura. Body proportions must be normal, fingers and sword hilt must not be deformed. --- ## 07 | Half-reclining on Tatami Dark Japanese room floor, background has shoji doors, old screens, low wood table, white flower vase, and white flower branches. Clear window light shadows on the floor, foreground can have slightly blurred flower branches or tea sets. The subject reclines on the tatami, one arm propping up the upper body, the other resting lightly near the obi or hem. Upper body slightly twisted, waist naturally tightened, legs naturally crossed and extended under the kimono. Note the body must be real: the position of both legs must be reasonable; even if covered by the kimono, there should be no missing, broken, or extra legs. She turns her head to look at the camera, with a nonchalant, cold, and charming gaze. Medium-long vertical composition, highlighting body curves, tatami texture, light and shadow cuts, and black fabric layers. --- ## 08 | Looking Back Half-kneeling Back View Dark Japanese room, background has bamboo shadow screen, white flower branches, shoji doors, and black paper umbrella. Light from outside illuminates the back, shoulder line, and side profile. The subject faces away or sideways from the camera, half-kneeling on the tatami. The back and sleeves of the black kimono show clear patterns of flowers, butterflies, and gold embroidery, with a three-dimensional silver-gold obi knot. Body forward, head and upper body turned back slightly, forming an elegant curve from back to waist. One hand holds the scabbard or folding fan, the other rests on the floor or hem. Legs are in a natural half-kneeling position, covered by the kimono but structurally complete, no strange lower body or extra limbs. She looks back at the camera, eyes cold, steady, alert, dangerous yet feminine. 3/4 body vertical composition, focusing on the back, obi, neck, looking back gaze, and body twisting beauty. --- ## 09 | Final Master Visual Main hall of a Japanese family mansion, background with shoji doors, dark wood pillars, old screens, black paper umbrella, white flower branches, and a low tea table. Overall more solemn and formal, like the cover of the entire photo set. The subject wears the most gorgeous black high-end kimono of the set, white inner lining collar, dark red, withered gold, and old silver embroidery, heavy silver-gray gold brocade obi, spider lily hair accessories more prominent, deep red lips. She adopts a formal queenly sitting posture: body seated upright but upper body slightly forward or turned. One hand on her lap, the other on a teacup, folding fan, or scabbard. Steady posture, but retaining the stretch of the neck, waistline, and feminine aura. She stares directly at the camera, eyes calm and powerful, like an underworld heiress truly settled in her position. Formal vertical composition, focusing on the face, gaze, neck, hands, obi, and overall power aura.
